name: Admiral Hubal
description: Pride of Hause Erkindu. He is a fearsome foe to face and strong ally to have. He is ruthless and relentless when it comes to war but has a softer side under that veener of coldness and anger. His hauting experiances amplified by his psionic brainmake up yet he keeps it all together like a champ after all he is the faithfull of the Amber Queen and loyal servant to the Zarnian Empress.
creator: ShahShakuras
